0.title: Welcome to the Documentation
0.content: This site documents our LLM project. Modify these pages using Jekyll to create and update your project documentation.

1.title: Getting Started
1.content: . | Run the project using Docker: docker-compose up --build . | View this documentation locally: docker-compose up docs . | .

2.title: Features
2.content: . | Uses Jekyll for clean documentation. | Supports GitHub Pages deployment. | Integrated with Docker for easy setup. | .
